notes: Hand-authored a 2BR ~1024 sqft (32x32 footprint, target 1000) plan that satisfies both hard constraints (window in every bedroom + kitchen/bathroom share a plumbing wall). Layout is a 3-band sandwich anchored at Foyer(0,0): Row1 public — Foyer(6x12) | Living(14x12) | Kitchen(12x12) all linked open-plan via 'open' walls (foyer.right<->living.left<->kitchen.left); Row2 service — Hall(20x6) below Foyer + Bath(12x6) right-of Hall; Row3 private — Bedroom2(14x14) below Hall + Master(18x14) right-of Bedroom2. The plumbing wall is Kitchen.bottom == Bath.top (both at y=12, x:20..32, 12 ft of shared wet wall) — the cleanest possible stack. Bedroom2 has window walls on left+bottom (corner exposure); Master has window walls on right+bottom (opposite corner) so each bedroom has its required window plus cross-ventilation. Connections: Foyer.top->outside door@50%, Foyer.bottom->Hall.top door@50%, Hall.right->Bath.left door@50% (bath routed through Hall not Foyer for privacy), Hall.bottom->Bedroom2.top door@30%, Hall.bottom->Master.top door@80% (door positions chosen so they sit inside each room's overlap with the Hall). Used relative positioning (right-of/below + align) per skill principle B; emitted explicit config{default_unit:ft, area_unit:sqft}. Exterior windows on Living.top and Kitchen.top+right give the public zone natural light; Bath.right is window for ventilation. Kitchen-Bath plumbing wall is annotated as solid (no door/window cut) so it functions as a true wet wall. Rooms-area sum = 72+168+144+120+72+196+252 = 1024 sqft, matches the bounding box exactly — no gaps or overlaps. validate.mjs: success, valid=true, 1 floor, 7 rooms, 0 errors/warnings. render.mjs --show-area --show-dimensions: success, 900px PNG (50693 bytes) + SVG (18468 bytes), 0 semantic errors; the same config_missing_default_unit renderer warning fires on the canonical assets/templates/two-br.floorplan, so it is a known renderer false positive (lengthUnit/areaUnit in the response are correctly 'ft'/'sqft'). design_critic.mjs: score 100, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 info findings; allClean=true. All 12 critic rules pass: entry_from_outside, reachability, corridor_width, door_opening, windowless_habitable, bedroom_bath_adjacency, wet_walls, bathroom_off_entry, corridor_only_hallway, bathroom_privacy, bedroom_size, overlap. Single verification pass; no exploratory rewrites after success.
